title: aconitum × dragulescuanum
intro: Aconitum × dragulescuanum, also known as Dragulesco's monk's hood or aconitum hybrid, is a rare and hybrid species of the Aconitum genus of flowering plants, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Aconitum × dragulescuanum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which should be used with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional due to its toxicity.
